privileged_info_summary: The task configures the SimpleNotes Android app to handle incoming share intents. The project is located at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/SimpleNotes with manifest at app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml and MainActivity activity at app/src/main/java/com/example/simplenotes/MainActivity.kt. The app must be configured to receive android.intent.action.SEND intents with MIME type text/plain, standard Android framework constants for text sharing. Additionally, android.intent.category.DEFAULT must be present in the intent filter per Android documentation for implicit intents. The task data is fully synthetic, generated by setup_task.sh from hardcoded project structure templates, not based on external datasets or real-world data sources.
